_gate_calibration.notes: IMU gate is identical to tc_rlowarm_w24_v1 — the IMU streams are the same; only the motion (skeleton) target changes. Fail rule: acc AND gyro magnitude correlation must BOTH fall below the floor.

_notes: estskel variant of tc_rlowarm_w24_v1: the ONLY difference is motion_source=motion_estimated (17-joint H36M estimated skeleton) instead of the default 21-joint ground-truth 'motion'.
Purpose: does the naive-wins-TSTR / mix-+37% conclusion survive when the skeleton side is degraded like a real AlphaPose+MotionBERT pipeline? Compare report against tc_rlowarm_w24_v1.
Requires scripts/sim2real/01b_build_estimated_skeleton.py to have written motion_estimated.npz into every corpus sequence dir first.
window_len=24 / stride=16 / channels / split / gate all identical to tc_rlowarm_w24_v1 so motion source is the single controlled variable.
